empty.title: No auctions found
empty.message: There are no auctions matching your criteria.
empty.noAuctionsMessage: Currently, there are no auctions created. Once the auction owner sets up new eAuctions, it will appear here.

english.title: English Reverse
english.description:
An English Reverse eAuction starts from suppliers’ pre-bids. Participants see their ranking and can submit improved offers until time expires. The final rank determines the winner.
• **Before the event:** Participants submit a pre-bid that sets their initial rank. • **During the event:** Ranking updates dynamically with each new bid. • **Timing:** Runs for a limited time, with automatic extensions if bids are placed in the final minutes. • **Awarding:** Lots are awarded according to final ranking and defined awarding principles.
english.trainings_description: Suppliers compete by placing lower bids. The last one to bid before the timer ends wins. Stay alert and bid smart.

dutch.title: Dutch Reverse
dutch.description:
A Dutch Reverse eAuction starts at a low price that increases step by step. The first participant to accept the price wins immediately.
• **Before the event:** A pre-bid may be required. • **During the event:** The price increases round by round in fixed increments; no live ranking is shown. • **Timing:** Limited duration but ends instantly when a bid is accepted. • **Awarding:** The first accepted bid secures the lot.
dutch.trainings_description: Price goes up over time. The first supplier to accept the current price wins instantly. Timing is everything.

japanese.title: Japanese Reverse
japanese.description:
A Japanese Reverse eAuction starts at a high price that decreases in rounds. Participants must confirm their bid each round to stay in the event. The last remaining bidder wins.
• **Before the event:** A pre-bid may be required. • **During the event:** Price decreases in fixed steps; participants must stay active each round or exit the auction. • **Timing:** Limited duration, ending when only one participant remains or the minimum price is reached. • **Awarding:** The last active participant secures the lot.
japanese.trainings_description: The price decreases gradually. You must confirm you're staying in each round. The last supplier remaining wins.

sealedBid.title: Sealed Bid
sealedBid.description:
In a Sealed Bid eAuction, participants submit confidential offers that remain hidden until the end. The most competitive bid wins.
• **Before the event:** Participants submit bids before the deadline. • **During the event:** Bids remain undisclosed; participants may revise offers until closure. • **Timing:** No live ranking; results revealed after the deadline. • **Awarding:** The most competitive bid secures the lot, based on awarding principles.
sealedBid.trainings_description: Suppliers submit confidential bids and can update them until the eAuction ends. When the time is over, the lowest final bid wins.

preferredDutch.title: Dutch Preferred
preferredDutch.description:
A Preferred Dutch Reverse eAuction works like a Dutch auction, but selected suppliers receive priority access to each price step before others. The first accepted bid wins.
• **Before the event:** Participants may submit pre-bids; preferred suppliers are designated. • **During the event:** Price rises in steps; preferred suppliers get first option at each step. • **Timing:** Limited duration but ends instantly when a bid is accepted. • **Awarding:** The first accepted bid secures the lot.
preferredDutch.trainings_description: Price goes up over time. The first supplier to accept the current price wins instantly. Timing is everything.

japaneseNoRank.title: Japanese No Rank
japaneseNoRank.description:
A Japanese No Rank eAuction decreases prices in rounds, with participants required to stay active each round. Unlike a standard Japanese auction, awarding is decided outside the auction.
• **Before the event:** A pre-bid may be required. • **During the event:** Price decreases in fixed steps; participants confirm each round or exit, with their exit price recorded. • **Timing:** Limited duration, ending once all rounds are complete. • **Awarding:** The final decision combines auction results with external criteria.
japaneseNoRank.trainings_description: The price decreases gradually. You must confirm you're staying in each round. The last supplier remaining wins.
